chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1298 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.5068/2025 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case. 25.09.2025 Mr. Shakeel Ahmed Lakho, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Balouch, Additional Advocate general along with Ghulam Murtaza Shah District Education officer (Elm. Sec & Higher Sec:) Sukkur and Javed Ahmed Channa (AEO) Focal Person DEO (Primary) Sukkur..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The respondent No. 4, files statement, same is taken on record. Copy thereof has been provided to the counsel for the petitioner. The counsel for the petitioners, under instructions does not press the instant petition. Accordingly, instant petition is hereby dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
